'''vochadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoledronic|zoledronic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-ch-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoledronic|zoledronic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vochadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vochadhithi|vochadhithi]] || [[word:vochadhiji|vochadhiji]] || [[word:vochadhishi|vochadhishi]] || [[word:vochadhiki|vochadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vochadhuthuthu|vochadhuthuthu]] || [[word:vochadhujuju|vochadhujuju]] || [[word:vochadhushushu|vochadhushushu]] || [[word:vochadhukuku|vochadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vochadhuthu|vochadhuthu]] || [[word:vochadhuju|vochadhuju]] || [[word:vochadhushu|vochadhushu]] || [[word:vochadhuku|vochadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vochadhufthuf|vochadhufthuf]] || [[word:vochadhufjuf|vochadhufjuf]] || [[word:vochadhufshuf|vochadhufshuf]] || [[word:vochadhufkuf|vochadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vochadhethe|vochadhethe]] || [[word:vochadheje|vochadheje]] || [[word:vochadheshe|vochadheshe]] || [[word:vochadheke|vochadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vochadhothotho|vochadhothotho]] || [[word:vochadhojojo|vochadhojojo]] || [[word:vochadhoshosho|vochadhoshosho]] || [[word:vochadhokoko|vochadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vochadhotho|vochadhotho]] || [[word:vochadhojo|vochadhojo]] || [[word:vochadhosho|vochadhosho]] || [[word:vochadhoko|vochadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vochadhofthof|vochadhofthof]] || [[word:vochadhofjof|vochadhofjof]] || [[word:vochadhofshof|vochadhofshof]] || [[word:vochadhofkof|vochadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vochadhĂŻfthĂŻf|vochadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vochadhĂŻfjĂŻf|vochadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vochadhĂŻfshĂŻf|vochadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vochadhĂŻfkĂŻf|vochadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vochadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|vochadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vochadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|vochadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vochadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|vochadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vochadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|vochadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vochadhĂŻfthĂŻf|vochadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vochadhĂŻfjĂŻf|vochadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vochadhĂŻfshĂŻf|vochadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vochadhĂŻfkĂŻf|vochadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vochadhĂŻfthĂŻf|vochadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vochadhĂŻfjĂŻf|vochadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vochadhĂŻfshĂŻf|vochadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vochadhĂŻfkĂŻf|vochadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vochadhĂŠthĂŠ|vochadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:vochadhĂŠjĂŠ|vochadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:vochadhĂŠshĂŠ|vochadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:vochadhĂŠkĂŠ|vochadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vochadhathatha|vochadhathatha]] || [[word:vochadhajaja|vochadhajaja]] || [[word:vochadhashasha|vochadhashasha]] || [[word:vochadhakaka|vochadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vochadhatha|vochadhatha]] || [[word:vochadhaja|vochadhaja]] || [[word:vochadhasha|vochadhasha]] || [[word:vochadhaka|vochadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vochadhafthaf|vochadhafthaf]] || [[word:vochadhafjaf|vochadhafjaf]] || [[word:vochadhafshaf|vochadhafshaf]] || [[word:vochadhafkaf|vochadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vochadhasha|vochadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vochadhshĂ«sha|vochadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vochadhrosha|vochadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vochadhmusha|vochadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vochadhyasha|vochadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govochadhnkshĂ«sha|govochadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govochadhnkrosha|govochadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govochadhnkmusha|govochadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govochadhnkyasha|govochadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vochachadhasha|vochachadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vochachadhshĂ«sha|vochachadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vochachadhrosha|vochachadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vochachadhmusha|vochachadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vochachadhyasha|vochachadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govochachadhnkshĂ«sha|govochachadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govochachadhnkrosha|govochachadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govochachadhnkmusha|govochachadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govochachadhnkyasha|govochachadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vechĂŠdhasha|vechĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vechĂŠdhshĂ«sha|vechĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vechĂŠdhrosha|vechĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vechĂŠdhmusha|vechĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vechĂŠdhyasha|vechĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govechĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|govechĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govechĂŠdhnkrosha|govechĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govechĂŠdhnkmusha|govechĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govechĂŠdhnkyasha|govechĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vochfadhasha|vochfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vochfadhshĂ«sha|vochfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vochfadhrosha|vochfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vochfadhmusha|vochfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vochfadhyasha|vochfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govochfadhnkshĂ«sha|govochfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govochfadhnkrosha|govochfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govochfadhnkmusha|govochfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govochfadhnkyasha|govochfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
